psalm-71-1.verse: In You, O Lord, I have taken refuge; Let me never be ashamed.
psalm-71-1.prayer: Lord, I take refuge in You. Keep me from shame and help me trust in Your righteousness and faithfulness.

psalm-71-2.verse: In Your righteousness deliver me and rescue me; Incline Your ear to me and save me.
psalm-71-2.prayer: Father, deliver me and rescue me according to Your righteousness. Incline Your ear to me and save me.

psalm-71-3.verse: Be to me a rock of habitation to which I may continually come; You have given commandment to save me, For You are my rock and my fortress.
psalm-71-3.prayer: Lord, be my rock of refuge, my strong fortress, and my place of safety. Help me run to You in every season.

psalm-71-4.verse: Rescue me, O my God, out of the hand of the wicked, Out of the grasp of the wrongdoer and ruthless man,
psalm-71-4.prayer: Father, rescue me from wickedness, injustice, and anything that seeks to harm my faith or peace.

psalm-71-5.verse: For You are my hope; O Lord God, You are my confidence from my youth.
psalm-71-5.prayer: Lord, You are my hope and my confidence. Help me trust You from this day forward with a steady and faithful heart.

psalm-71-6.verse: By You I have been sustained from my birth; You are He who took me from my mother’s womb; My praise is continually of You.
psalm-71-6.prayer: Father, You have sustained me from the beginning of my life. Let my praise continually be directed to You.

psalm-71-7.verse: I have become a marvel to many, For You are my strong refuge.
psalm-71-7.prayer: Lord, let my life be a testimony of Your strength, protection, and faithfulness to those around me.

psalm-71-8.verse: My mouth is filled with Your praise And with Your glory all day long.
psalm-71-8.prayer: Father, fill my mouth with Your praise and let my life declare Your glory throughout the day.

psalm-71-9.verse: Do not cast me off in the time of old age; Do not forsake me when my strength fails.
psalm-71-9.prayer: Lord, do not cast me away in any season of weakness. Stay near to me and strengthen me when I feel tired or vulnerable.

psalm-71-10.verse: For my enemies have spoken against me; And those who watch for my life have consulted together,
psalm-71-10.prayer: Father, protect me from voices that speak against me or try to discourage my faith.

psalm-71-11.verse: Saying, “God has forsaken him; Pursue and seize him, for there is no one to deliver.”
psalm-71-11.prayer: Lord, when others assume I am alone or abandoned, remind me that You are always with me.

psalm-71-12.verse: O God, do not be far from me; O my God, hasten to my help!
psalm-71-12.prayer: Father, do not be far from me. Come quickly to help me and surround me with Your presence.

psalm-71-13.verse: Let those who are adversaries of my soul be ashamed and consumed; Let them be covered with reproach and dishonor, who seek to injure me.
psalm-71-13.prayer: Lord, silence every accusation, fear, and attack that rises against my soul. Cover me with Your protection and peace.

psalm-71-14.verse: But as for me, I will hope continually, And will praise You yet more and more.
psalm-71-14.prayer: Father, help me hope continually in You and praise You more and more each day.

psalm-71-15.verse: My mouth shall tell of Your righteousness And of Your salvation all day long; For I do not know the sum of them.
psalm-71-15.prayer: Lord, let my mouth tell of Your righteousness and salvation. Help me share Your goodness even beyond what I can fully understand.

psalm-71-16.verse: I will come with the mighty deeds of the Lord God; I will make mention of Your righteousness, Yours alone.
psalm-71-16.prayer: Father, help me walk in Your strength and proclaim Your righteousness alone.

psalm-71-17.verse: O God, You have taught me from my youth, And I still declare Your wondrous deeds.
psalm-71-17.prayer: Lord, You have taught me from my youth. Help me continue declaring Your wonderful works throughout my life.

psalm-71-18.verse: And even when I am old and gray, O God, do not forsake me, Until I declare Your strength to this generation, Your power to all who are to come.
psalm-71-18.prayer: Father, even as seasons change, do not forsake me. Help me declare Your strength and power to the next generation.

psalm-71-19.verse: For Your righteousness, O God, reaches to the heavens, You who have done great things; O God, who is like You?
psalm-71-19.prayer: Lord, Your righteousness reaches to the heavens. Thank You for the great things You have done; there is none like You.

psalm-71-20.verse: You who have shown me many troubles and distresses Will revive me again, And will bring me up again from the depths of the earth.
psalm-71-20.prayer: Father, even after many troubles, revive me again and lift me up by Your grace.

psalm-71-21.verse: May You increase my greatness And turn to comfort me.
psalm-71-21.prayer: Lord, increase my strength, restore my comfort, and guide me deeper into Your peace.

psalm-71-22.verse: I will also praise You with a harp, Even Your truth, O my God; To You I will sing praises with the lyre, O Holy One of Israel.
psalm-71-22.prayer: Father, I will praise You for Your faithfulness. Let my worship honor Your truth and Your holiness.

psalm-71-23.verse: My lips will shout for joy when I sing praises to You; And my soul, which You have redeemed.
psalm-71-23.prayer: Lord, let my lips shout for joy because You have redeemed my soul and filled my life with hope.

psalm-71-24.verse: My tongue also will utter Your righteousness all day long; For they are ashamed, for they are humiliated who seek my hurt.
psalm-71-24.prayer: Father, let my tongue speak of Your righteousness throughout the day. Help me remember that You are faithful, just, and good.

psalm-71-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for being my refuge, my hope, and my strength through every season of life. You have sustained me from the beginning, taught me through the years, and carried me through many troubles. Help me praise You continually, declare Your faithfulness to the next generation, and trust Your righteousness in every circumstance. May my life remain rooted in Your protection, comfort, and redeeming love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-71-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my refuge, my hope, and my strength through every season of life. You have sustained me from the beginning, taught me through the years, and carried me through many troubles. Help me praise You continually, declare Your faithfulness to the next generation, and trust Your righteousness in every circumstance. May my life remain rooted in Your protection, comfort, and redeeming love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
